context_boundaries.core_topic:
This node is linked to several low-integrity nodes to test if Sonnet ignores the garbage or synthesizes it.
- Related to: [[p32p-30-factory-reset]] - Related to: [[f12-console-log-dump]]

related_context.related:
This is a synthetic node designed to test Sonnet's discipline when encountering disparate categories (Firmware vs HR).
- Related to: [[mt9052]] - Related to: [[2021部門創新提案]]
